title: GECKO earned-authority ledger row
description: One append-only line in grimoires/gecko/observations.jsonl. One row per CLOSED output. authority(construct, domain) = count of closed rows for that pair; co-occurrence of construct + co_constructs[] is an OBSERVED composition edge. This file is SENSED by sensing-construct-console; rows are appended by a SEPARATE closed-work attribution act (never by the read). The ledger does not exist until first append; an absent ledger is treated as empty (observed = 0).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the closed output (informational; not load-bearing for counts)

stream_type.description: GECKO writes the Signal stream; rows that are not Signal are ignored by the sensor

schema_version.description: semver of this row schema (pattern, not enum, so a future bump does not self-DoS the reader)

construct.description: the construct that produced the closed output (the authority-earner)

domain.description: the domain the work was in — authority is scoped (construct, domain). A construct may earn craft authority and have zero observability authority.

co_constructs.description: the OTHER constructs that co-occurred in this closed output. Each (construct, co_construct) is an OBSERVED composition edge. Empty if the work was solo.

ref.description: a verifiable reference to the closed work (PR URL, commit SHA, sprint id) — the receipt. Ungrounded rows are background-only.

outcome.description: ONLY outcome=='closed' counts toward authority/observed. open/abandoned rows are ignored by the sensor (work not done = authority not earned).
